name: ComponentIndex
summary: Represents an index of an element contained in another object.

constructors.name: ComponentIndex
constructors.summary: Construct component index with a specific type/index combination

methods.name: IsUnset
methods.summary: Return true is this component index is the same as the Unset component index

properties.name: ComponentIndexType
properties.summary: The interpretation of Index depends on the Type value.
